input.headline: Catstanbul: The city where cats rule the streets

raw.headline: Catstanbul: The city where cats rule the streets

winner: In Catstanbul, if you're late for a meeting, just meow-sage your apologies - the traffic lights are all run by felines!

candidates.text: Why don't we need traffic signs in Catstanbul? Because the cats already have nine lives and a map of the city!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on traffic signs and cats' nine lives, concise and specific to the headline."}

candidates.text: In Catstanbul, if you're late for a meeting, just meow-sage your apologies - the traffic lights are all run by felines!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative wordplay with 'meow-sage' and feline control of traffic lights adds surprise and specificity, aligning well with the headline."}

candidates.text: In Catstanbul, now, it's the dogs who are on leashes, while cats rule the streets unleashed!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Playful twist on the headline with a clever reversal of roles between cats and dogs, concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: In Catstanbul, even the dog park has a feline-only entrance!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on a dog park with a feline-only entrance, specific to Catstanbul, concise and funny."}

candidates.text: In Catstanbul, dogs are merely the locals' exotic pets.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on the headline with clever wordplay and specificity."}
